serviceDescription: Amazon Chime lets you meet, chat, and collaborate with the security of AWS. You can work seamlessly on your devices, and meet from your desk or on the go - ensuring you always stay connected.

templates.title: Amazon Chime
templates.description: Quick estimate: Use the quick estimate for a fast route to a rough estimate.

cards.title: Toll Public Switched Telephone Network (PSTN) Audio
cards.helpText: The Amazon Chime SDK allows you to add phone numbers for your meetings so that attendees can participate using a landline or mobile phone. For dial in, the service currently supports DID and toll-free phone numbers in 15 countries. For dial out, the service supports calling to over 115 countries. To use PSTN audio, builders create a serverless IVR application using AWS Lambda.
cards.bodyText: The Amazon Chime SDK allows you to add phone numbers for your meetings so that attendees can participate using a landline or mobile phone. For dial in, the service currently supports DID and toll-free phone numbers in 15 countries. For dial out, the service supports calling to over 115 countries. To use PSTN audio, builders create a serverless IVR application using AWS Lambda.

cards.title: Call Recording
cards.helpText: With Amazon Chime SDK PSTN Audio call recording, you are only charged for what you use, on a per-minute rate for the time that call recording is on.
cards.bodyText: With Amazon Chime SDK PSTN Audio call recording, you are only charged for what you use, on a per-minute rate for the time that call recording is on.

cards.title: Serverless Voice App
cards.helpText: With Amazon Chime SDK PSTN Audio you can build serverless voice applications that enable use cases such as a click to call application on your website or app, as well as conversational voice experiences built in conjunction with Amazon Lex.
cards.bodyText: With Amazon Chime SDK PSTN Audio you can build serverless voice applications that enable use cases such as a click to call application on your website or app, as well as conversational voice experiences built in conjunction with Amazon Lex.
